item.title: Robotic Grasping Using Evolutionary Deep Neural Networks
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: AI-based robotic grasping system combining deep neural networks and evolutionary optimization for robust object grasp estimation.

item.title: Smart Tuning Technology
item.author: adgaona7@gmail.com (Andres Gaona)
item.description: Smart Tuning Technology automates controller and servo driver tuning using optimization algorithms and sensor feedback, enabling fast and reliable parameter tuning across platforms.
